personality_one_liner: A premium, reassuring, and flawlessly clean medical experience centered around trust, soft curves, and elegant whitespace.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room. Cards should never touch screen edges. Use generous padding inside elegant white cards.

do's: Use blur on bottom-tab bar so scrolling content is slightly visible behind it
Use glass effect for sticky header over scrolling content
Float 'Book Again' or action buttons using blur container when sticky
dont's: Don't overuse glass inside list cards
Avoid glass if readability drops below WCAG threshold

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Provide a warm welcome, quick access to specialties, and immediate visibility of connected doctors and health tips.

states.loading: Centered soft spinner with a 'Loading health dashboard...' message.
states.error: Message: 'Unable to load dashboard. Please try again.' with a Retry button.

screens.layout: Root is a ScrollView. Top header with Location (left) and Avatar (right). Below header, a Welcome Banner (gradient background, text 'Good morning, Rahul', health illustration). Next section: 'Specialties' horizontally scrollable row of icons in rounded boxes. Next section: 'My Doctors' horizontal scrollable list of connected doctors (Card with Photo, Name, Speciality, Visit button). Next section: 'Health Tips' carousel with full bleed image cards and gradient-to-dark scrim for text readability.

screens.name: Appointments
screens.purpose: Track upcoming and past consultations with clear status indicators.

states.empty: Illustration of calendar + 'No appointments scheduled' + 'Book an Appointment' CTA.

screens.layout: Sticky Header with 'Appointments'. Segmented tabs below header (Upcoming / Past). Underneath, a vertical list of elegant white cards. Each card contains doctor photo (left), Name & hospital & date (right), a status badge (e.g. 'Confirmed' in mint green), and action buttons at bottom of the card (Reschedule / Book Again). Cards have soft shadow_tier 1.

screens.name: MyDocs
screens.purpose: A comprehensive directory to search, filter, and access all connected doctors. Serves as the central floating action tab.

states.empty: Illustration + 'You haven't connected with any doctors yet.'
states.error: Error loading doctors list. Retry button.

screens.layout: Header with search bar and filter chips (Cardio, Derma, Nearby) below it. Vertical ScrollView of Doctor cards. Each card spans full width (minus padding). Card layout: Row with Doctor Image, Name, Hospital, Specialty. A small pill indicating 'Consulted 3 times'. A prominent 'Visit' or 'Book' button aligned to the right or bottom of the card. Tapping card navigates to Doctor Overview.

screens.name: Doctor Overview
screens.purpose: Detailed profile of a doctor and history of patient interactions.
screens.layout: Top section: Doctor Photo, Name, Specialization, Hospital, Rating/Experience in a clean centered or aligned-left layout. Sticky primary CTA 'Book Again' at the bottom of the screen (in a glass container). Middle section: Two tabs or vertical sections showing 'Appointments Till Date' (list of past dates) and 'Prescriptions' from this doctor.

screens.name: Prescription
screens.purpose: View and manage digital medical prescriptions cleanly and legibly.
screens.layout: Vertical list grouped by Date/Doctor. Each item is a card showing Doctor Name, Date, small preview of medicine names, and a 'View Prescription' button. Clicking opens a detailed view (BottomSheet or new screen) containing clean readable medical format (Doctor details header, list of medicines with dosage instructions, advice notes).

screens.name: Profile
screens.purpose: Patient personal details and app settings.
screens.layout: Top: Patient Avatar, Name, Contact info, Location. Below: A list of touchable rows (Personal Details, My Doctors, My Appointments, Prescriptions, Notifications, Help & Support). Each row has an icon in a brandTertiary tinted rounded container, title, and right chevron.

screens.name: Book Appointment
screens.purpose: Seamless flow to select date, time and confirm booking.
screens.layout: Doctor summary at top (small). Calendar strip (horizontal scroll for dates). Grid of available time slots below. Sticky 'Confirm Booking' CTA at the bottom.

welcome_banner_bg.alt: Soft medical blue mint gradient background

health_tip_1.alt: Woman standing in a kitchen holding an apple

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply '1 iOS-Native Clean' guidelines: maintain generous padding (xl/2xl), use soft shadow tier 1 for cards, and rounded edges (md/lg) across the app.

User requested a 'premium, clean, soft, modern medical look' with 'blue + mint blended gradients'. The brandPrimary is soft blue and brandSecondary is mint green. Use these in gradients (e.g. for the welcome banner or floating action button).
Center Tab 'MyDocs': Must be a prominent, elevated, floating circular button on the bottom tab bar. Use a custom absolute positioned container if necessary.
Health Tips Carousel on Home: The images provided (health_tip_1, health_tip_2) MUST have a dark gradient scrim overlay (transparent to surfaceInverse) at the bottom, so text over it remains readable.
Doctor Image fallback: For Dr. Neha Kulkarni, since no female photo is available in the payload, use an initial-based avatar ('NK') inside a brandTertiary tinted circle.
Ensure 'Book Appointment' sticky CTA on the Doctor Overview screen floats gracefully over scrolling content, utilizing a glass/blur background constraint.
Typography must be clean (Plus Jakarta Sans). Cap font weight at 500 max everywhere (no bold/extra bold). Use size to denote hierarchy.
